data.name: A Soldier's Struggle
data.detailed_description:
A Soldier’s Struggle is a short visual novel about resilience, love, and the healing power of friends. After years away, a young man returns to a life he barely recognizes. As old wounds linger and new challenges emerge, his journey becomes one of rediscovering trust, hope, and the strength found in love. Follow along as he reconnects with his landlady and roommate and explores new aspects of their relationship.

This is a kinetic novel, meaning it is a linear, story-driven experience with no choices or branching paths—perfect for players who enjoy a short and sweet story.
data.about_the_game:
A Soldier’s Struggle is a short visual novel about resilience, love, and the healing power of friends. After years away, a young man returns to a life he barely recognizes. As old wounds linger and new challenges emerge, his journey becomes one of rediscovering trust, hope, and the strength found in love. Follow along as he reconnects with his landlady and roommate and explores new aspects of their relationship.

This is a kinetic novel, meaning it is a linear, story-driven experience with no choices or branching paths—perfect for players who enjoy a short and sweet story.
data.short_description: After years away, a young man returns home to mend broken bonds and find strength in love. A Soldier’s Struggle is a short kinetic novel about resilience, healing, and the enduring power of friends. Experience a heartfelt journey in this brief but emotional story.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1600 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1600 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Steam OS or Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1600 MB 可用空間
